checks.detail: 11/11 target answer packets have visible rendering coverage.
Every target route resolves to a page manifest entry.
Every target packet maps to a visible route.
Rendering uses visible HTML only; treatment JSON-LD path remains present and unchanged by this QA.
Visible answer section uses aria-labelledby, server component rendering, and non-collapsed HTML.
Private dentist contact route uses the shared page builder and receives the injected visible answer section.
